ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
James Hetherington, Esq. for Plaintiff Rainbow Cab, present by Ajmat Ali, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant, Aiyana Thi Le Hang Eitz.
Principal of $12,800.00
Costs of $149.34
For the total of $12,949.34
Does 1-20 are dismissed.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2003 Continued To Jul-10-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: David Davenport, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Matter is continued to July 10, 2003 on plaintiff's request.
